info.title: Logitech Plugin Tool
info.description: Logi Plugin Tool is a command-line utility designed to assist developers in creating, building, packaging, verifying, and managing plugins for the Logi Actions SDK. Comprehensive SDK documentation is available at: https://logitech.github.io/actions-sdk-docs/

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
LogiPluginTool 6.1.4.22672

Usage:
    LogiPluginTool <command> [options]

Tool for managing Logi plugins

Commands:
    generate <PluginName>                      Generate a new plugin skeleton
    pack <InputDirectoryPath> <OutputPackage>  Package an existing plugin
    verify <PackagePath>                       Verify a plugin package (.lplug4)
    metadata <PackagePath>                     Show metadata of a plugin package
    install <PackagePath>                      Install a plugin package
    uninstall <PluginName>                     Uninstall a plugin by name

Options:
    -h, --help                                Show this message and exit

Examples:
    LogiPluginTool generate Example
    LogiPluginTool pack ./bin/Release/ ./Example.lplug4
    LogiPluginTool verify ./Example.lplug4
    LogiPluginTool metadata ./Example.lplug4
    LogiPluginTool install ./Example.lplug4
    LogiPluginTool uninstall Example

Notes:
    - <PluginName> is a plugin name (e.g., "Example") with no spaces.
    - <InputDirectoryPath> and <OutputPackagePath> are relative or absolute paths. Use ./ for current folder.
    - <PackagePath> refers to the full path of the .lplug4 plugin package file.
    - Wrap paths in quotes if they contain spaces, e.g., "./My Plugins/Example.lplug4"

arguments.name: pluginName
arguments.description: Specify the name of the plugin skeleton

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Specify the path to the plugin package
